_note: Cross-provider image/video price table powering /prices. cents = US cents per native unit, copied from ai-art @art/models registry (verified against provider pages) + Kunavo billing API. Normalize to one reference output: image=flat, second=×5 (5s clip), call=flat. license is best-effort — 'open' = downloadable/self-hostable weights, 'proprietary' = API-only — edit freely. kind: generate|edit|upscale|bg-removal. Keep the Kunavo rows in sync with ../src/media-registry.ts.

_textNote: Text LLM cross-provider pricing, mirror of README.md 'Text model pricing' (verified 2026-05). inUsd/outUsd = USD per 1M tokens. OpenRouter passes list price (= official); Kunavo is a flat 20% off official (Anthropic + Google only); TokenMart varies 15–65% off and is shown only where the README gives an explicit effective rate. Ranked cheapest by blended in+out. Re-probe before routing — list price ≠ effective price.
